---
title: "Diagnostics TVAR"
author: "Bruno Sullivan"
date: "2025-12-05"
output: html_document
---
###Tanay diagnostic tests##
```{r}
##lag selection##

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(vars)
library(tsDyn)
library(tseries)
library(ggplot2)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")
lag_pt    <- 10 


lag_max <- 10
lag_sel <- VARselect(df_m[, var_names], lag.max = lag_max, type = "const")
lag_sel

p_lag <- 2

```

## Build Regime Specific VARs from TVARs
```{r}


build_regime_VARs <- function(df_m, tvar_obj, p = p_lag) {
  reg <- tvar_obj$model.specific$regime
  stopifnot(length(reg) == nrow(df_m))

  df_reg <- df_m %>%
    mutate(regime = reg) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(var_names), regime)

  df_low  <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 1L) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()
  df_high <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 2L) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()

  n_low  <- nrow(df_low)
  n_high <- nrow(df_high)

  if (n_low <= p || n_high <= p) {
    warning("Not enough observations in at least one regime for VAR(p).")
    return(list(
      df_low   = df_low,
      df_high  = df_high,
      var_low  = NULL,
      var_high = NULL,
      N_low    = n_low,
      N_high   = n_high
    ))
  }

  var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p, type = "const")
  var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p, type = "const")

  list(
    df_low   = df_low,
    df_high  = df_high,
    var_low  = var_low,
    var_high = var_high,
    N_low    = n_low,
    N_high   = n_high
  )
}

```


## Eigenvalue Modulus


```{r}

compute_stability <- function(var_low, var_high) {
  if (is.null(var_low) || is.null(var_high)) {
    return(
      tibble(
        regime     = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
        max_mod    = NA_real_,
        stable_VAR = NA
      )
    )
  }

  eig_low  <- roots(var_low,  modulus = TRUE)
  eig_high <- roots(var_high, modulus = TRUE)

  tibble(
    regime     = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
    max_mod    = c(max(eig_low), max(eig_high)),
    stable_VAR = c(all(eig_low  < 1), all(eig_high < 1))
  )
}
```



```{r}


total_SSR_VAR <- function(var_fit) {
  sum(unlist(lapply(var_fit$varresult, function(eq) sum(residuals(eq)^2))))
}

compute_ssr_grid <- function(df_m,
                             p      = p_lag,
                             n_grid = 30,
                             trim   = 0.15) {

  df <- df_m %>%
    arrange(date) %>%
    drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

  th <- df$EPU

  th_lo   <- quantile(th, trim,     na.rm = TRUE)
  th_hi   <- quantile(th, 1 - trim, na.rm = TRUE)
  th_grid <- seq(th_lo, th_hi, length.out = n_grid)

  map_dfr(th_grid, function(gamma) {

    df_reg <- df %>%
      mutate(regime = if_else(EPU <= gamma, 1L, 2L)) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(var_names), regime)

    df_low  <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 1L) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()
    df_high <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 2L) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()

    if (nrow(df_low) <= p || nrow(df_high) <= p) {
      return(tibble(threshold = gamma, SSR = NA_real_))
    }

    var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p, type = "const")
    var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p, type = "const")

    SSR_total <- total_SSR_VAR(var_low) + total_SSR_VAR(var_high)

    tibble(threshold = gamma, SSR = SSR_total)
  })
}
```

```{r}


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tsDyn)
library(vars)
library(tseries)

sec_name <- "Healthcare"  

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")

df_s <- sector_panel %>%
  filter(sector == sec_name) %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
    d_vol = sector_iv - lag(sector_iv),
    ret   = RET_eq
  ) %>%
  drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret, EPU)

Y_sec  <- as.matrix(df_s[, var_names])
th_sec <- df_s$EPU

lag_sel_sec <- VARselect(df_s[, var_names], lag.max = 2, type = "const")
print(lag_sel_sec)


p_sec <- 2

tvar_sec <- TVAR(
  data    = Y_sec,
  lag     = p_sec,
  nthresh = 1,
  thVar   = th_sec,
  trim    = 0.15,
  model   = "TAR"
)

print(tvar_sec)


regime_vec <- tvar_sec$model.specific$regime
stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(df_s))

df_reg <- df_s %>%
  mutate(regime = regime_vec) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(var_names), regime)

df_low  <- df_reg %>%
  filter(regime == 1L) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>%
  drop_na()

df_high <- df_reg %>%
  filter(regime == 2L) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>%
  drop_na()

cat("Obs in low regime:",  nrow(df_low),  "\n")
cat("Obs in high regime:", nrow(df_high), "\n")

var_low_sec  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p_sec, type = "const")
var_high_sec <- VAR(df_high, p = p_sec, type = "const")


eig_low  <- roots(var_low_sec,  modulus = TRUE)
eig_high <- roots(var_high_sec, modulus = TRUE)

stab_tbl_sec <- data.frame(
  sector     = sec_name,
  regime     = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
  max_mod    = c(max(eig_low), max(eig_high)),
  stable_VAR = c(all(eig_low < 1), all(eig_high < 1))
)


print(stab_tbl_sec)


```



```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(vars)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)

var_names <- c("d_cds", "d_vol", "ret")
p_lag     <- 2      # VAR lag order
lag_pt    <- 10    # Portmanteau test lag

run_joint_portmanteau_sector <- function(sec,
                                         sector_panel,
                                         sector_models,
                                         p      = p_lag,
                                         lag_pt = lag_pt) {


 df_s <- sector_panel %>%
  filter(sector == sec) %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(
    d_cds = PS_eq     - lag(PS_eq),
    d_vol = sector_iv - lag(sector_iv),
    ret   = RET_eq
  ) %>%
  tidyr::drop_na(d_cds, d_vol, ret)   # <-- EPU removed here


  mod_sec    <- sector_models[[sec]]
  regime_vec <- mod_sec$model.specific$regime
  stopifnot(length(regime_vec) == nrow(df_s))

  df_reg <- df_s %>%
    mutate(regime = regime_vec) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(var_names), regime)

  df_low  <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 1L) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()
  df_high <- df_reg %>% filter(regime == 2L) %>% dplyr::select(all_of(var_names)) %>% drop_na()

  N_low  <- nrow(df_low)
  N_high <- nrow(df_high)


  if (N_low <= p || N_high <= p) {
    return(
      tibble(
        sector = sec,
        regime = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
        N      = c(N_low, N_high),
        p_value = NA_real_
      )
    )
  }


  var_low  <- VAR(df_low,  p = p, type = "const")
  var_high <- VAR(df_high, p = p, type = "const")


  pt_low  <- serial.test(var_low,  lags.pt = lag_pt, type = "PT.asymptotic")
  pt_high <- serial.test(var_high, lags.pt = lag_pt, type = "PT.asymptotic")

  tibble(
    sector  = sec,
    regime  = c("Low EPU", "High EPU"),
    N       = c(N_low, N_high),
    p_value = c(pt_low$serial$p.value,
                pt_high$serial$p.value)
  )
}


sectors_use <- setdiff(names(sector_models), "Energy")

joint_portmanteau_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  sectors_use,
  ~ run_joint_portmanteau_sector(.x, sector_panel, sector_models,
                                 p = p_lag, lag_pt = 10)
)

joint_portmanteau_results

```
